summary: Completed testing of new OCR feature. All 47 backend tests pass (100%) including 9 new OCR tests. Frontend OCR UI verified - OCR Scan button, individual OCR buttons, OCR badges, and toast notifications all working correctly.
passed_tests: Document Search - Sorted by Match Count
OCR All Skips Documents With Text

ocr_single_document_backend.details: POST /api/cases/{case_id}/documents/{document_id}/ocr endpoint working correctly. Returns success status, ocr_used flag, content_length, and content_preview. Updates document's content_text and ocr_extracted fields in database.

ocr_all_documents_backend.details: POST /api/cases/{case_id}/ocr-all endpoint working correctly. Processes all documents without text, skips documents with existing text (>100 chars). Returns total_documents, successful_extractions, and detailed results array.

ocr_image_files.details: OCR successfully extracts text from PNG, JPG, and other image formats using pytesseract.

ocr_scanned_pdfs.details: OCR successfully extracts text from scanned PDFs (image-based PDFs) using pdf2image and pytesseract. Converts PDF pages to images then runs OCR.

ocr_frontend_batch_button.details: OCR Scan button (data-testid='ocr-all-btn') in Documents tab header triggers batch OCR. Shows loading state, displays toast notification with results.

ocr_frontend_individual_button.details: Individual OCR button (data-testid='ocr-doc-{document_id}') appears for documents without text. Clicking triggers single document OCR and updates UI.

ocr_badges.details: Documents processed with OCR display purple 'OCR' badge. Documents without text show amber 'No Text' badge.

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py - Added 9 OCR tests and test_case_id_with_ocr_docs fixture
seed_data_creation: Test images (test_ocr_image.png, test_ocr_image2.png, new_ocr_test.png) and scanned PDF (scanned_document.pdf) uploaded to case_31f73f915633 for OCR testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: OCR feature fully tested and working. Test session token still valid. Test case 'PDF Test Case' (case_31f73f915633) has 6 documents including images and scanned PDFs with OCR-extracted text. All prior features (document search, multi-file upload, PDF export, barrister view, grounds of merit, notes, reports) continue to work.
